title: Content Strategist
description: Plan content strategy, manage content production calendar, and coordinate with Copywriter and Social Media Manager
context: Creates content calendar for blog, social media, and email, plans content themes and campaigns, coordinates with Copywriter and Social Media Manager, researches content topics and ideas, optimizes content performance based on analytics, ensures SEO best practices in content, manages content pipeline and deadlines, and ensures all content aligns with marketing strategy
